name: LFTD PARTNERS INC.
business: LFTD Partners Inc. manufactures and sells hemp-derived psychoactive products, kratom, and non-hemp wellness gummies under brands like Urb, Highlandia, Mielos, and Rebel Energy Gummy, and is the exclusive worldwide manufacturer and seller of Diamond Supply Co. hemp-derived products. The company sells through distributors, wholesalers, and directly to consumers online.

exposures.sentence: Lifted primarily sells psychoactive products, but also non-intoxicating energy and wellness products.

catalysts.event: Launch of Mielos brand of hemp-free health and wellness gummies
catalysts.sentence: In the second quarter of 2024, Lifted launched Mielos (www.mielos.com), a new brand of health and wellness products that do not contain hemp derivatives.

catalysts.event: Launch of Rebel Energy Gummy hemp-free energy gummies
catalysts.sentence: In the third quarter of 2024, Lifted launched hemp-free energy gummies under its Rebel Energy Gummy brand (www.RebelEnergyGummy.com).
In the first quarter of 2026, Lifted began selling Highlandia hemp-derived beverages (www.Highlandia.com).
